finding: Cloudflare Pages deployment metadata must bind the returned deployment URL and immutable commit to the exact requested Pages branch; project, URL, commit, and successful stage alone permit a branch-confusion false acceptance.

primary_sources.relevance: Cloudflare Pages deployments expose deployment records used by the control-plane verifier.
Cloudflare Pages distinguishes production and preview behavior by branch, making branch identity part of deployment meaning.

behavior: requires an explicit valid expected branch
resolves the requested branch from the workflow-dispatch event when no explicit environment value exists
records the branch-resolution source without recording credentials
fails closed on missing, malformed, or mismatched branch identity

verification.source_inspection: committed module and tests were read back through the GitHub contents interface
verification.local_runtime: unavailable because the isolated runtime had no network path to fetch exact committed bytes

falsification_route: run node --test cloudflare-static/verify-cloudflare-deployment-metadata.test.mjs in a fresh checkout
dispatch the Cloudflare workflow with a non-main preview branch
confirm the verifier accepts only a deployment record whose project, commit, URL, branch, and successful deploy stage all match
substitute a deployment record from another branch and confirm classification no-exact-match
limits: No Cloudflare deployment occurred in this run.
No resolving Pages hostname or served research surface was observed.
No CI or local execution of the exact committed test bytes was observed.
Branch-bound control-plane metadata does not prove served-byte identity or scientific truth.
No diagnosis or treatment claim is made.
privacy_boundary: Contains public repository paths, commit identifiers, official public documentation, and non-secret verification state only.
